Landing.tagline: Marriage-intent matchmaking — privacy and verification first.
Landing.intro: We are building a premium, safe experience for serious Muslims worldwide. The site is under construction.

footer.tagline: Serious, marriage-intent matchmaking — private and verified.
footer.draftNote: Legal pages are drafts under review.

hero.subtitle: A protected platform for serious Muslims worldwide: verified identities, photos kept private until mutual consent, and respectful contact without pressure.

how.title: Three calm steps
how.subtitle: No rush, no countdowns.
how.step1Desc: A manual review confirms seriousness before you appear.
how.step2Desc: Profiles built on compatibility, not appearance.
how.step3Desc: One considered request, then photo reveal by mutual consent.

principles.title: Principles we won't compromise
principles.p1Desc: Your photos are blurred by default, your date of birth is private, and your data is yours.
principles.p2Desc: Human identity review keeps out the non-serious.
principles.p3Desc: No swiping, no chasing, and no shame when someone declines.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: Are my photos visible to everyone?
faq.a1: No. Your photos are blurred by default and revealed only when you and the other person both agree.
faq.a2: You upload an ID document and a selfie, reviewed manually by a human team; they stay private.
faq.a3: You start for free. Any future paid plans will be clear, with no surprises.

cta.title: Begin your journey, seriously
cta.subtitle: Join a community that respects your time and privacy.

About.title: About Nisfi
About.lead: Nisfi is a marriage-intent matchmaking platform for serious Muslims worldwide, built on privacy and verification first.
About.missionBody: To offer a respectful, safe space where seriousness and compatibility come before appearance — far from throwaway-app mechanics.
About.notBody: It is not a casual dating app or a social network; no swiping, no public photo display, and no false promises.
About.v1: Privacy is a right, not a feature.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.lead: We'd love to hear from you. The site is under construction and official support channels are being set up.
Contact.channelsNote: We will announce support channels and response times officially before launch; we don't make promises we can't keep.
Contact.comingSoon: The contact form will be enabled in its approved unit.

Legal.draftNotice: This page is an early draft for illustration only, not a final legal document. It is under legal review and creates no obligation or guarantee.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: We are committed to minimizing and protecting your data. This draft outlines the general principles until the legal text is approved.
privacy.s1Body: The account and profile data you provide, and basic technical information needed to run and secure the service.
privacy.s2Body: Photos are blurred by default and never publicly readable; the verification selfie is private. Date of birth and verification data are treated as sensitive.
privacy.s3Body: You have rights of access, correction, and deletion as set out by the final legal text and regulatory review.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: This draft sets out general expectations of use until the final legal text is approved.
terms.s1Body: The service is for adults serious about marriage, who commit to respectful conduct and truthful information.
terms.s2Body: Harassment, impersonation, and abusive content are prohibited; moderation actions may be taken to protect the community.
terms.s3Body: You can manage and delete your account; violating accounts may be restricted under our safety policies.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Begin your journey — private and verified.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
errors.authFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Auth.legalNote: By continuing you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
Auth.pendingNote: Authentication will connect when Firebase is wired in the next step.
Auth.forgotSent: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset message.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: One last step before you sign in.
verify.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Open it, then come back and continue.
verify.notYet: Your email isn't verified yet. Open the link in your inbox, then try again.

Onboarding.title: Complete your profile
Onboarding.subtitle: Short steps, and your progress is saved automatically.
Onboarding.compatibilityHint: Answer what fits you; you can skip any question.

done.title: Your steps are saved
done.body: We saved the first steps of your profile. Continue to the app or finish later.

Onboarding.pendingNote: This will save to your account when Firebase is connected; your progress is stored locally for now.

Me.title: My profile
Me.notSet: You haven't completed your profile yet.
Me.bannerText: Your profile is {completion}% complete. Finish it so eligible members can see it.

Photos.title: Your photos
Photos.subtitle: Your photos are protected: members see only a blurred version, revealed by mutual consent.
Photos.addHint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP, up to 8 MB.
Photos.privacyNote: The original is private and never publicly readable; our team reviews each photo before its blurred display.
Photos.empty: No photos yet. Add one to get started.

Common.comingSoonNote: This area is part of the approved design shell; its content is built in its own approved unit.

Discover.title: Discover
Discover.subtitle: Browse verified, compatibility-led profiles — no swipe algorithms.
Discover.previewNote: Preview with sample data — connected to the project later.
Discover.emptyBody: Widen or clear your filters to see more profiles.
Discover.errorBody: Something went wrong while fetching. Please try again.
Discover.ctaComingSoon: Sending requests begins in the next unit

Requests.emptyDesc: When you send or receive a request, it appears here with its clear status. Start by browsing verified members.
Requests.composerHint: Start with an honest, respectful note introducing yourself and your intent.
Requests.messagePlaceholder: Assalamu alaikum, I'd like to get to know you with marriage in mind…
Requests.noContactShared: Don't share phone numbers or handles — contact stays on the platform.
Requests.sentBody: Your request will reach {name}; you'll be notified when they respond.
Requests.sentPreview: In this preview nothing is actually sent — it connects to the server later.
Requests.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

deny.self: You can't send a request to yourself.
deny.senderNotEligible: Your account must be verified before sending requests.
deny.recipientNotEligible: This member isn't available to receive requests right now.
deny.duplicatePending: You already have a pending request with this member.
deny.alreadyConnected: You're already connected with this member.
deny.declineCooldown: You can't re-send to this member right now.
deny.pendingLimit: You've reached the pending-request limit ({count}). Wait for a reply or withdraw one.
deny.dailyLimit: You've reached today's send limit. Try again tomorrow.

Requests.title: Requests
Requests.subtitle: Your received and sent requests and their status.
Requests.emptyReceivedBody: When a member sends you a request, it appears here to accept or decline.
Requests.emptySentBody: Browse verified members and start with a written request.

Matches.emptyDesc: When a request is accepted by both sides, a calm conversation begins. Browse members to start your first respectful contact.
Matches.title: Matches
Matches.subtitle: Your conversations after a mutual accept.
Matches.emptyBody: When a request is mutually accepted, a match and a calm conversation begin.
Matches.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Matches.chatSoonBody: Real-time chat inside this match is built in the next unit.

Notifications.emptyDesc: We'll let you know here about new requests, matches, and verification updates — without noise.
Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Verification.title: Identity verification
Verification.desc: Your request is under manual review. We verify seriousness to protect everyone; your photo and verification selfie stay private and are never shown to members.
Verification.intro: To protect everyone, we review your identity manually. Your documents are fully private and never shown to members.
Verification.selfiePrivacyNote: The selfie and ID are private; only the review team accesses them via time-limited access, and no original is stored publicly.
Verification.pendingDesc: We received your request and are reviewing it manually. We'll let you know the result soon.
Verification.approvedDesc: Your identity is verified, and the verified mark now appears on your profile.
Verification.rejectedDesc: We couldn't verify your documents. Review the note, then resubmit.
Verification.previewNote: This will be submitted for real when Firebase is connected; this is a local preview.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.note: Manage account, privacy, language, and blocking. Options are built in their approved unit.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.trendNote: Sample figures for preview — computed from real sources in the approved unit.

verifications.title: Verification queue
verifications.heading: Verification requests
verifications.evidenceNote: Time-limited review access — logged to the audit trail; no original is stored.
verifications.auditNote: Staff note: first selfie is under-lit; the second is clear and matches. — Moderator 2

users.title: Members
users.emptyDesc: Search and filter members and review cases. Built in its approved unit.

reports.title: Reports
reports.emptyDesc: Safety reports appear here for review, preserving evidence and reporter confidentiality.

ProfileDetail.unavailableBody: It may not be eligible to view, or it no longer exists.
ProfileDetail.photosNote: Photos are protected; originals are revealed only by mutual consent.
ProfileDetail.requestComingSoon: Sending requests begins in the next unit
ProfileDetail.requestNote: Contact starts with a written request — no direct messages before acceptance.

requestAccepted.title: Your request was accepted
requestAccepted.body: {name} accepted your request — you can connect now.

requestDeclined.title: Request not accepted
requestDeclined.body: Your request wasn't accepted this time.

verificationApproved.title: Your account is verified
verificationApproved.body: Your identity check is complete — you can connect now.

verificationRejected.title: Re-verification needed
verificationRejected.body: Your verification wasn't accepted. You can try again.

matchClosed.title: A match was closed
matchClosed.body: One of your matches was closed.

Blocked.title: Blocked list
Blocked.subtitle: Blocked members can't see you or contact you, and you won't see them.
Blocked.emptyBody: You haven't blocked any member yet.
Blocked.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.
